title: LODESTAR_FREEDOM AND JUSTICE
defaultBriefing: Gather intelligence documents and prepare for the march to Christiansborg Castle.

intelDocuments.title: Intel Gathered
intelDocuments.text: Nationalists plan a peaceful march to present a petition to the Governor at Christiansborg Castle.

intelDocuments.title: Intel Gathered
intelDocuments.text: Colonial checkpoints report increased patrols along the Accra coastal road.

intelDocuments.title: Intel Gathered
intelDocuments.text: Dr. Kwame Nkrumah urges restraint — the march must remain peaceful to win international support.

intelDocuments.title: Intel Gathered
intelDocuments.text: Sergeant Adjetey, Corporal Attipoe, and Private Odartey Lamptey led the peaceful 28 February 1948 march. Superintendent Colin Imray's constables opened fire at Christiansborg Crossroads.

victoryMessage: March to Christiansborg! Independence momentum secured.
